title: Algorithms
summary: 9618 P4 — searching, sorting, and algorithm efficiency.
learningObjectives: Describe bubble, insertion, and merge sort at syllabus level.
Compare algorithm efficiency using Big-O ideas.

simpleExplanation.title: Step-by-step problem solving
simpleExplanation.summary: Algorithms are finite sequences of steps. Choice of algorithm affects speed as data size grows.
steps: Binary search: O(log n), sorted data.

sections.content: **Algorithms** (19.1) is core **P4 practical** theory. Use the **interactive logic builder** while tracing search steps.
